intro: Eighty-two percent of businesses report unexpected AI costs, revealing a widespread struggle with managing generative AI expenses. The Pentagon's internal AI platform GenAI.mil has grown from 80,000 users at launch in December to 1.5 million daily users across the Defense Department. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warned that AI dominance risks hollowing out entire industries, comparing the current transition to early globalization.

whitelist.title: Most businesses say they've been caught out by unexpected high AI bills
whitelist.desc: 82% have faced unexpected or unplanned bills

whitelist.title: 1.5 million Defense Department workers are now using the military's generative AI every day, Pentagon official says
whitelist.desc: Around 80,000 employees used GenAI.mil when it launched in December. That number has since skyrocketed.

whitelist.title: Salesforce acquires AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion | TechCrunch
